name: Crocs, Inc.
summary: PART I The Company Crocs,Inc. and our consolidated subsidiaries (collectively, the Company, we, us, or our) are engaged in the design, development, worldwide marketing, distribution, and sale of casual lifestyle footwear and accessories for all. We strive to be the world leader in innovative casual footwear, combining comfort and style with a value that consumers want. We have two reportable operating segments: the Crocs Brand and the HEYDUDE Brand, which are discussed in more detail in Business...
